Description

Tie-back analysis package for field development screening.

    TiebackAnalyzer.resolveRouteLengthKm(FieldConcept discovery, HostFacility host, double discoveryLatitude, double discoveryLongitude, TiebackRouteNetwork routeNetwork)

    Resolves water depth from concept infrastructure and host data.
